summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Domínio Bridge - Classification System. All 20 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI testing completed successfully for Dashboard, History, Statement Details, Companies, Chart of Accounts, and New Processing pages. The intelligent classification learning system is working correctly - manual classifications are saved to history and applied automatically to similar transactions in future uploads.

issues: React hydration warnings in console (span inside option/tbody) - cosmetic only, doesn't affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: React hydration warnings in History.js and StatementDetails.js - span elements inside option/tbody causing warnings. Consider refactoring dynamic content rendering.
seed_data_creation: Test data created during backend tests was cleaned up after each test
context_for_next_testing_agent: The intelligent classification system is fully functional. Classification history API at /api/classification-history stores manual classifications. When uploading new statements, the classify_transaction() function checks history for similar descriptions (>60% similarity) and applies saved classifications automatically. Test accounts: 1.1.1.02.000006 (BANCO NUBANK - ATIVO), 3.1.1.01.000001 (RECEITA).

transaction_update_with_learning.PUT /api/transactions/{id}: PASS - Updates transaction and saves to classification_history

intelligent_classification.Auto-classification on upload: PASS - Similar descriptions (>60% match) get auto-classified
intelligent_classification.Usage count tracking: PASS - usage_count increments on each use

xlsx_export.GET /api/bank-statements/{id}/export: PASS - Exports with correct columns (Descrição, Data, Valor, Conta Débito, Conta Crédito, Histórico)
